segments.speaker: Technician
segments.text: Have you used the laser cutter before?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I've used similar equipment, but not this exact setup.

segments.speaker: Technician
segments.text: Then you'll need to complete the safety training first.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Of course. Is that online, or do I need to attend a session in person?

segments.speaker: Technician
segments.text: Both. Watch the online module, then book a short in-person checkout.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. I'm hoping to use it for an architectural model later this semester.

segments.speaker: Technician
segments.text: That's pretty common. Just check material restrictions before you buy anything.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good point. Are chipboard and basswood usually okay?

segments.speaker: Technician
segments.text: Yes, but no PVC, and no mystery plastics.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: No mystery plastics. Easy to remember.

segments.speaker: Technician
segments.text: Once you're cleared, you can reserve time through the portal.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. Thanks for helping me avoid a beginner mistake.
